headline: Is American Water Works (AWK) Pricing In Too Much Stability After Recent Share Performance?
summary: Before getting into the details, it helps to be clear on what you are really asking yourself: at around US$138.14 per share, is American Water Works Company fairly priced, expensive, or potentially offering value right now? Over shorter periods, the stock has been relatively steady, with a 0.9% return over the last 7 days and 2.6% over the past month, while the year to date return of 6.0% contrasts with a 3.8% decline over the past year and a 2.5% decline over three years.
